title: Matching-adjusted indirect treatment comparison of A+AVD vs PET-guided ABVD in newly diagnosed advanced Hodgkin lymphoma.
abstract: The study team investigated the relative efficacy of brentuximab vedotin, doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine (A+AVD) versus positron emission tomography (PET)-guided doxorubicin, bleomycin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine (ABVD) among previously untreated adults with advanced Hodgkin lymphoma via matching-adjusted indirect comparison (MAIC).
